characters.name: open/close all folders
characters.description: The main character, a 19-year-old (one year older in the anime) who has failed the entrance exams for the prestigious University of Tokyo twice. During his third attempt, he is asked by his grandmother to become temporary manager of the Hinata House, a hot springs inn, while she is away on a trip — except she forgot to tell him that it has since been converted into an all-girls' dormitory. Accidental Declaration of Love: In chapter 70, when Naru visits him at the hospital, Keitaro accidentally confesses his love to her on the spur of the moment. Afterwards, Naru avoids him out of embarrassment for a while, until she tells him that she isn't ready to be his girlfriend and to pretend the confession didn't happen. Accidental Pervert: It's his definingRunning Gag. At leastOnce per Episode, he somehow walks in on the girls changing or bathing, along with being caught in manyNot What It Looks Likemoments with them. The fact that he lives in a) a female-only dormitory and b) said dormitory is also a hot spring, the odds are completely against him. In the final chapter, his wedding concludes with him stepping on the skirt of Naru's wedding dress, exposing her underwear to him and all the guests. Adventurer Archaeologist: A trait he eventually gets from Seta when he becomes his mentor. Age Lift: In the manga he's 19 years old at the start of the story, while in the anime he's 20.

characters.name: Keitaro Urashima
characters.description: The main character, a 19-year-old (one year older in the anime) who has failed the entrance exams for the prestigious University of Tokyo twice. During his third attempt, he is asked by his grandmother to become temporary manager of the Hinata House, a hot springs inn, while she is away on a trip — except she forgot to tell him that it has since been converted into an all-girls' dormitory. Accidental Declaration of Love: In chapter 70, when Naru visits him at the hospital, Keitaro accidentally confesses his love to her on the spur of the moment. Afterwards, Naru avoids him out of embarrassment for a while, until she tells him that she isn't ready to be his girlfriend and to pretend the confession didn't happen. Accidental Pervert: It's his definingRunning Gag. At leastOnce per Episode, he somehow walks in on the girls changing or bathing, along with being caught in manyNot What It Looks Likemoments with them. The fact that he lives in a) a female-only dormitory and b) said dormitory is also a hot spring, the odds are completely against him. In the final chapter, his wedding concludes with him stepping on the skirt of Naru's wedding dress, exposing her underwear to him and all the guests. Adventurer Archaeologist: A trait he eventually gets from Seta when he becomes his mentor. Age Lift: In the manga he's 19 years old at the start of the story, while in the anime he's 20.

characters.name: Naru Narusegawa
characters.description: The main female character, a 17-year-old top scorer at mock exams and a resident of the Hinata House. While initially disdainful of Keitaro, his poor academics and his accidental perversions, she starts to fall for him. She made a promise with her old private tutor and crush Seta to enter the University of Tokyo and helps Keitaro with his studies so they can get in together. Accidental Kiss: Her first kiss with Keitaro happens by accident when Sarah kicks Naru in the back of the head. Adaptation Dye-Job: In the manga, her hair has an orange tint to it. The anime gave her light brown hair. Adaptational Jerkass: Her abusiveTsundere"antics" towards Keitaro are exaggerated in the anime and her most significantPet the Dogmoments are left out. It's really not helped by how herCharacter Developmentdoesn't start to become apparent until the last two episodes of the first series. Aesop Amnesia: She completely forgot the lessons which Keitaro learned (thanks for her help) and spent the last moments in the story running away from Keitaro and from her own feelings, three times no less.

characters.name: Mitsune "Kitsune" Konno
characters.description: A 19-year-old member of the Hinata House and a freelance writer, who hails from the Kansai region. Trickster, troublemaker, and professional layabout. In contrast to her best friend, Naru, she revels in herassets, and is not above using every scheme in the book to get her way, or at the very least make the house less boring. Accent Adaptation: She's given a Southern accent in the English dub to reflect her Kansai dialect in the original Japanese. Animal Motifs: Foxes; she's nicknamed "Kitsune" (Japanese for "fox") since it sounds similar to her real given name (Mitsune), and herpermanently closed eyesresemble those found in Japanese depictions of foxes. Her mischievous and deceitful personality also matches thefox stereotype. Ascended Extra: The anime gave her a larger part to play in the Keitaro/Naru/Mutsumi triangle and explored further her crush on Seta. Boyish Short Hair: The shortest hair of the girls, at least until Motoko cuts hers off towards the end of the manga.

characters.name: Shinobu Maehara
characters.description: Shinobu, the youngest member of the House at 13 years old, decided to live on her own due to her parents' divorce and her refusal to choose between which parent to live with. She and Kaolla are the youngest residents of the House, being the mild-mannered counterpart to the energetic Kaolla. Adaptational Angst Upgrade: The manga only offhandedly mentions Shinobu ended up in Hinata Inn because of problems at home. On the other hand, the anime has anAdaptation Expansionshowing Shinobu comes from a troubled home where her parents were in the process of getting divorced. She decides to live at Hinata Inn with Keitaro instead of keep listening to her parents argue over who she is going to stay with. The Baby of the Bunch: She's the youngest resident of the Hinata Inn, being only 13 years old. Keitaro and the girls usually look after her because of this. Book Dumb: She says she gets bad grades at school, which destroyed her self-confidence until Keitaro inspired her to keep trying to improve in her studies. Despite her efforts, she still does so poorly at school that she gets a zero in a test at one point.Later on she starts shooting for Tokyo U also and her grades do eventually improve. Cannot Spit It Out: So many times she could confess to Keitaro, but she's too shy to do so.

characters.name: Motoko Aoyama
characters.description: A 15-year-old kendo practitioner and member of a family with their own style of kendo. While seemingly calm and aloof at first glance, she's likely the least stable of the dorm residents, as she has severe insecurities about men, her own sense of femininity, her family,and turtles. Absurd Phobia: She has an incomprehensible fear of turtles — made all the more jarring by the fact that the Housedoeshave a pet turtle.And said turtle has a crush on her. Supplementary materials reveal that she developed her fear of turtles fromaccidentally walking in on her sister and brother-in-law in an intimate position, which relates to how "turtle head" is Japanese slang for "penis", but that doesn't really explain why she'd be so afraid of the actual animal. Action Girl: She stands out as a trained swordswoman all the more in a romantic comedy series with little to no focus on action. It comes in handy at least once when she had to fight off aDemonic PossessedNaru. Aloof Dark-Haired Girl:Subverted. She is very attractive, tall, raven-haired, and on the surface, she seems very aloof and serious. However, it turns out that she's not as put together as she looks, having aHair-Trigger Temperand quite a few insecurities that she struggles with. Ax-Crazy: With herHair-Trigger Temperand her willingness to use her sword on anyone who annoys her even slightly (i.e. Keitaro), Motoko is clearlynotthe poster girl for sanity.

characters.name: Kaolla Su
characters.description: 14-year-old, Kaolla is an energetic, dark-skinned girl from a foreign country who currently resides in the House.Gadgeteer Genius,Genki Girl, andCloudcuckoolanderextraordinaire. Ambiguously Bi: She's attracted to Keitaro, but she alsostole Shinobu's first kiss. And Call Him "George": She once accidentally breaks Keitaro's back while hugging him during her sleep. Animal Motifs: She's constantly jumping around, hanging from a high place or another person, and eating bananas, very much like a monkey. Attack Hello: Her way of greeting Keitaro involves hitting him in the face with a flying kick. Occasionally she'll miss and hit him with her...area.

characters.name: Haruka Urashima
characters.description: Matron of the Hinata House and Keitaro's 29-year-old maternal cousin and aunt, having been adopted by their grandmother after the death of her own mother, who was the older sister of Keitaro's mother. Berserk Button: Shehatesbeing reminded of hersingle statusand Keitaro calling her "Aunt" (homophone of "old woman" in Japanese). Competing with a Corpse: Back in college, Haruka and JuliaMcDougalwere both in love with Seta, but he would only choose one of them when he turned thirty. However, Julia passed away soon after. When Seta does propose marriage to Haruka after turning thirty, Haruka violently rejects him because it doesn't feel right for her to "win" becauseher only love rival is long dead. It surely doesn't help Seta is raising Julia's daughter as his own.She does come around and marries Seta near the end of the manga. Cool Big Sis: For all that she's also willing to smack Keitaro (generally forcalling her Oba-san), she's supportive of him and tries to help him out of situations. She's also ready and willing to dispense advice to the others at Hinata House. Covert Pervert: Implied — whenever one of the girls is wearing a weird outfit, chances are it came from Haruka's closet, which apparently includes a frilly Victorian dress and aMeidooutfit. Add to that her skill with (and ownership of) a whip...

characters.name: Tama
characters.description: A hot springs turtle given to Naru by Mutsumi after helping her return to Okinawa. Ambiguous Gender: Keitaro refers to it as a boy, while Naru and Shinobu refer to it as a girl. Mutsumi (the resident turtle expert) never specifies Tama's actual gender. Bare-Handed Blade Block: Tama's front feet stop Motoko's blade once, which makes her go into shock. Empathy Pet: Tama can copy the mannerisms of some of its owners. Flying Seafood Special: Is able to fly.

characters.name: Mutsumi Otohime
characters.description: A newcomer to the Hinata House from Okinawa and, like Keitaro, is a 20-year-oldRōnin, though her failures stem less from being an academic underachiever than from her clumsiness and tendency to faint at the most inappropriate times. Accidental Pervert: Mutsumi accidentally causes many scenes heavy onHomoerotic Subtextwith Naru, apparently without even realizing it. At one point, Kanako uses her as Keitaro's substitute and she ends up in suggestive situations with the girls of Hinata House in the same way Keitaro does all the time. Always Someone Better: Mutsumi repeatedly outdoes Naru in various tasks not intentionally or meanly, she just does. Ambiguously Bi: Mutsumi is obviously in love with Keitaro, but she sure doesn't seem to dislike getting into homoerotic situations with Naru. She also admits to liking Naru as much as she likes Keitaro, right after kissing her even. However, it's unknown if her feelings for Naru are romantic or just aPseudo-Romantic Friendship. Betty and Veronica: Keitaro's two promise girl candidates are Naru and Mutsumi. Mutsumi is the spaceyNice Girlwho has a lot in common with Keitaro, making her the Betty. However, theLove Triangleis majorlydownplayedbecause while Mutsumi does like Keitaro, she actively wants him and Naru to be togetherto the point she was the one who pushed them into making theChildhood Marriage Promise.

characters.name: Noriyasu Seta
characters.description: An archaeology professor at the University of Tokyo who Keitaro meets up the steps of the Hinata House after returning from Kyoto with Naru and the rest of the Hinata girls. Absent-Minded Professor: He works as an archaeology professor, but tends to be gullible, clueless and forgetful. He's also agodawful driver, yet doesn't seem to notice all the blood on him when he "parks". The Ace: He's an expert archaeologist, able to raise a kid by himself, and good enough at martial arts to take on a Shinmei-ryu swordswoman. There's only one thing he can't do well:driving. Adventurer Archaeologist: He frequently goes off to various digs in dangerous places to find exciting new discoveries. He's even compared toIndiana Jones. Badass Bookworm: He works as an archeologist and teacher, yet is skilled enough at martial arts to fight toe-to-toe with Motokowithout any weaponsand he even defeated her in their first duel.

characters.name: SarahMcDougal
characters.description: Seta's 9-year-old adopted daughter from California and a tomboyish brat to boot. Angst? What Angst?:In-Universeexample. The girls of Hinata Inn are shocked to hear Sarah nonchalantly talk about her mother's untimely death. Back for the Finale: She leaves Hinata Inn afterSeta marries Haruka. We see her again in the epilogue some years later when she goes to Keitaro and Naru's wedding along everyone. Bitch in Sheep's Clothing: When she first arrives at Hinata Inn, Sarah plays nice in front of Naru when she's actually an insufferableBratty Half-Pintwho deliberately sets Keitaro up to be beaten up by Naru. Bratty Half-Pint: She's an immature troublemaker who likes nothing more than making things harder for poor Keitaro.

characters.name: Hinata "Hina" Urashima
characters.description: Keitaro's grandmother and original manager of Hinata Inn. She left for her world-wide tour, passing the inheritance of the inn on to Keitaro. Cool Old Lady: Hears about Keitaro's problems and the hard time his parents are giving him about getting into Tokyo U, so she sets him up with the landlord position so that he can focus on studying while no longer mooching off his parents. Also, it frees her up to go on an extended hot springs tour vacation. The Ghost: She's mentioned several times throughout the manga, but doesn't make an actual appearance until one of the final chapters. Miniature Senior Citizens: She doesn't show up frequently, but it's shown that she's less than half of Haruka's height. Walking the Earth: She left the Hinata House to tour the world's hot springs.

characters.name: Tsuruko Aoyama
characters.description: Motoko's 28-year-old older sister's whose refusal to succeed to the God's Cry School in favor of settling down with her husband brought some resentment into her younger sister. Action Girl: She's a Shinmei-ryu swordswoman powerful enough that even her sister Motoko doesn't want to make an enemy of her. Always Someone Better: To hear Motoko talk of it, anything she could do, Tsuruko could do better. Berserk Button: If you ever lie to her, pray she never catches on. Tsuruko getsscarywhen she knows someone is telling her lies. Beware the Nice Ones: She's a genuinely nice person, justdon't make her realize you lied in front of heror else she can get as terrifying as a demon.

characters.name: Masayuki Haitani & Kimiaki Shirai
characters.description: Keitaro's friends and, like him, a pair ofRonins. Casanova Wannabe: Haitani tries to hit many girls as possible but always get dumped. Demoted to Extra: They fade in importance fast in the anime, and even faster in the manga. And they have their funlampshadingthis. Ephebophile: Implied with Shirai. At some point of the story, they are hanging out with Keitaro and spot a group of three ladies (which are Motoko, Naru and Su). Haitani says he prefers the one on the left (Motoko), Keitaro reluctantly says he prefers the one in the middle (Naru) and Shirai says he prefers the one on the right (Su). Haitani calls him for opting for Su since she is a middle schooler. Rōnin: In fact, exam cram schools are how they know Keitaro.

characters.name: Kanako Urashima
characters.description: Keitaro's 17-year-old adopted sister with some feelings for him. Aloof Dark-Haired Girl: She has black hair and usually shows herself as cold and distant to everyone besides Keitaro. Ambiguously Bi: Kanako being head-over-heels in love with Keitaro is indicative of her being attracted to men; however, as noted inDouble Standard: Rape, Female on Femalebelow, she also molested the other Hinata residents and was implied to have all but raped Motoko while disguised as Naru in order to torment them. It's not certain if she's genuinely bisexual or a straight girl whose homoerotic actions towards the Hinata girls are a case ofPragmatic Pansexuality. Arc Villain: She's the antagonist in one of the last story arcs towards the end of the series after taking over the Hinata Inn. After the end of her own arc, she has the same importance of other girls instead of being Naru's rival for Keitaro's love. Because You Were Nice to Me:Played With. Kanako says she developed a crush on Keitaro because he was the one in her adopted family who treated her the most kindly, but flashbacks show KeitaroForce Feedingher pastries just like his parents did because they never got that she hates sweets.

characters.name: Nyamo Namo
characters.description: A young girl of the island Pararakelse. Her grandfather was once an acquaintance of Seta, and after her grandfather's death, Nyamo decided to work with Seta on his excavations to continue her grandfather's work. Alliterative Name:NyamoNamo. Funny Foreigner: Nyamo's humor is mostly centered around her not understanding Japanese language and customs. Identical Stranger: She's identical to Shinobu, except for her darker skin and longer hair, and has also a similar personality. Innocent Fanservice Girl: The girls try to cheer Keitaro up in the hot springs. Though the plan had everyone inbikinis, Nyamo doesn't get it and is completely nude.

characters.name: Ema Maeda
characters.description: A timid girl who appears in the epilogue. Ema hopes to get into the University of Tokyo so she can improve her life and have people notice her. Due to her poor grades, she left home in order to live at the "legendary" Hinata Inn, which is believed to have the power to get anyone into the University of Tokyo. A-Cup Angst: She lacks in self-confidence due to her skinny build and being "flat as a board". Accidental Pervert: When she first arrives to Hinata Inn, Shinobu mistakes her for a pervert after running into her in the hot springs, not having realized that Ema is also a girl. Bespectacled Cutie: She's a very klutzy and meek girl who wears glasses. Cute Clumsy Girl: She is clumsy like Keitaro and cute like Shinobu.

characters.name: Kentaro Sakata
characters.description: An anime-exclusive character and aHopeless Suitorfor Naru's heart. Butt-Monkey: After his debut episode, he appears solely to get punished in some way or taken advantage of. Given how smug he acts, though, nobody feels bad about it. Canon Foreigner: He was a filler character introduced in the anime, and never made it back into the manga. Deus ex Machina: He shows up whenever he's needed, usually with whatever form of transportation the plot needs (such as a car with a bike in the back, or a car/rocketship thing). Fourth-Wall Observer: "Well. I suppose that's all the screen time I'm getting this time."

characters.name: Amalla Su
characters.description: Kaolla's older sister and the other princess of the Kingdom of Molmol. Ascended Extra: She is only mentioned in the manga, but appears in the anime. Kissing Cousins: She has been in love with her cousin Crown Prince Lamba Lu for a long time, but has never admitted her feelings to him. Magical Flutist: She cancontrol the weather and summon lightningby playing her flute. Prefers Going Barefoot: Like her sister, she is perpetually barefoot, only wearing a pair of anklets.

characters.name: Lamba Lu
characters.description: Kaolla's "brother" who is actually her cousin. He is the king of their nation, and in the tradition of their people, he has to serve in the military for a period of time. Before that happens, he is required to marry. Alliterative Name:LambaLu. Ascended Extra: He is only mentioned in the manga, but appears in the anime. Childhood Marriage Promise: Once when Kaolla was a very young girl he promised to marry her, but then he realises that she only sees him as a brother, whereas Amalla is in love with him. He marries Amalla instead. Identical Stranger: He looks just like Keitaro, only with darker skin and without glasses.

characters.name: Mei Narusegawa
characters.description: Naru's younger stepsister. Canon Foreigner: She's an anime-original character. She does make acameoin the manga in the final chapter during her sister's wedding. Girlish Pigtails: She wears her hair like this, showing her childish character. Production Foreshadowing: She's wearing aMahora Academy uniformduring her cameo in the manga. Relationship Sabotage: Mei visits the Hinata House in order to bring Naru home and attempts to disrupt the relationship between her sister and Keitaro by increasing the odds of Keitaro falling for Mutsumi Otohime, going as far as revealing a photo of the pair as children and suggesting that Mutsumi was the Promise Girl that Keitaro had been searching for.
